reviews.comment:
Estación de servicio con ubicacion estratégica. No hay otra cerca sobre ruts para carga de combustible

(Translated by Google)
Gas station with a strategic location. There are no other nearby fuel stations on the main roads.

reviews.comment:
Excelente estacion de servicio. Todo muy limpio y bien mantenido. La atención de las chicas excelente!!!! Muy buena predisposición

(Translated by Google)
Excellent gas station. Everything was very clean and well-maintained. The staff were excellent! Very helpful and accommodating.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/8700140572418264453/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBd0k3Qkx3EAE

reviews.comment:
Excelente atencion, muy bien en el servicio de combustible y en el bar de la estacion. Excelente trato, muy amables.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, very good fuel service and at the station bar. Excellent treatment, very friendly.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/8700140572418264453/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURRcnMyRmh3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Estacion de servicio muy completa. Con una renovada atención brinda a los turistas todo lo necesario para continuar su viaje. Servicompras funcional. Cordial atención en todos sus sectores y denota la eficiente responsabilidad de su concecionario. Excelente!!!

(Translated by Google)
A very complete service station. With its updated service, it provides tourists with everything they need to continue their journey. The convenience store is functional. The friendly service in all departments demonstrates the efficient responsibility of the concessionaire. Excellent!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/8700140572418264453/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURnakpqSTlRRRAB
